measures.name: Latest Batch Status
measures.expression:
VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7)
VAR MaxDateInPeriod = 
    CALCULATE(
        MAX('audit_batch_log'[session_start]), 
        FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate)
    )
RETURN 
    CALCULATE(
        UPPER(MAX('audit_batch_log'[batch_status])), 
        'audit_batch_log'[session_start] = MaxDateInPeriod
    )

measures.name: Successful Runs
measures.expression: CALCULATE([Total Sessions], 'audit_session_log'[session_status] = "success")

measures.name: Success Rate
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN DIVIDE(CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_session_log'), 'audit_session_log'[session_status] = "success", FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate)), CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_session_log'), FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate)), 0)

measures.name: Failed Sessions
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_session_log'), 'audit_session_log'[session_status] = "failed", FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate))

measures.name: Total Processed Rows
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(SUM('audit_table_session_log'[processed_rows]), 'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Failed Tables
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_table_session_log'), 'audit_table_session_log'[status] = "failed", 'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Succeeded Tables
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_table_session_log'), 'audit_table_session_log'[status] = "success", 'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Total Tables Processed
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_table_session_log'), 'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Avg Batch Duration
measures.expression:
VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) 
RETURN CALCULATE(
    AVERAGEX('audit_batch_log', DATEDIFF([session_start], [session_end], MINUTE)), 
    FILTER(
        'audit_batch_log', 
        'audit_batch_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate &&
        'audit_batch_log'[batch_status] = "success"
    )
)

measures.name: Filter Session Log
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDays = SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) // Defaults to 7 days
VAR CurrentRowDate = MAX('audit_session_log'[session_start])
VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SelectedDays
RETURN
IF(
    CurrentRowDate >= CutoffDate,
    1,
    0
)

measures.name: Avg Table Duration
measures.expression:
VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) 
RETURN CALCULATE(
    AVERAGEX('audit_table_session_log', DATEDIFF('audit_table_session_log'[start_time], 'audit_table_session_log'[end_time], MINUTE)), 
    FILTER(
        'audit_table_session_log', 
        'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate && 
        'audit_table_session_log'[status] = "success"
    )
)

measures.name: Total Errors
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_error_log'), 'audit_error_log'[error_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Failed Table Sessions
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_table_session_log'), 'audit_table_session_log'[status] = "failed", 'audit_table_session_log'[start_time] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Invalid Record Count
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(SUM('audit_invalid_record'[invalid_record_count]), 'audit_invalid_record'[rejected_timestamp] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Tables With Invalid Data
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(DISTINCTCOUNT('audit_invalid_record'[table_name]), 'audit_invalid_record'[rejected_timestamp] >= CutoffDate)

measures.name: Session Duration
measures.expression:
VAR StartTime = MIN('audit_session_log'[session_start])
VAR EndTime = MAX('audit_session_log'[session_end])
RETURN 
IF(
    ISBLANK(EndTime),
    DATEDIFF(StartTime, NOW(), MINUTE),
    DATEDIFF(StartTime, EndTime, MINUTE)
)

measures.name: Total Sessions
measures.expression:
VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) 
RETURN CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS('audit_session_log'), 
    FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate)
)

measures.name: Total Batches
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_batch_log'), FILTER('audit_batch_log', 'audit_batch_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate))

measures.name: Success Batches
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_batch_log'), FILTER('audit_batch_log', 'audit_batch_log'[batch_status] = "success" && 'audit_batch_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate))

measures.name: Success Sessions
measures.expression: VAR CutoffDate = TODAY() - SELECTEDVALUE(DateParameter[Days], 7) RETURN CALCULATE(COUNTROWS('audit_session_log'), FILTER('audit_session_log', 'audit_session_log'[session_status] = "success" && 'audit_session_log'[session_start] >= CutoffDate))

measures.name: Data Last Updated
measures.expression:
MAX(
    MAX(
        MAX('audit_table_session_log'[start_time]),
        MAX(
            MAX('audit_batch_log'[session_start]),
            MAX('audit_session_log'[session_start]))),
    MAX(
        MAX('audit_table_session_log'[end_time]),
        MAX(
            MAX('audit_batch_log'[session_end]),
            MAX('audit_session_log'[session_end]))))

measures.name: FormattedDateMeasure
measures.expression: FORMAT(SELECTEDVALUE('audit_session_log'[session_start]), "dd-MM-yyyy")
